# Society & Economics

Topics in the **Society & Economics** category of *the year 2012*.

| [European Debt Crisis — 2012 Escalation](european-debt-crisis-2012.md) | Spain's banking collapse and Greece's record debt restructuring brought the eurozone near breakup, until the ECB's July "whatever it takes" pledge and the September OMT program restored market confidence. |
| [Occupy Wall Street — 2012 Momentum](occupy-wall-street-2012.md) | The Occupy movement's second-year surge: the May 1 general strike mobilized tens of thousands across U.S. cities and the September 17 anniversary drew 185 arrests, keeping economic-inequality discourse central to the 2012 election year. |
| [KONY 2012 Campaign](kony-2012-campaign.md) | Invisible Children's March 5 advocacy film reached 100 million YouTube views in six days, then drew rapid backlash over factual accuracy, "white savior" framing, and nonprofit accountability — a canonical case study in viral digital activism and its offline limits. |
| [Hurricane Sandy — 2012 Atlantic Disaster](hurricane-sandy-2012.md) | The October 29 superstorm that flooded New York City's subways and devastated the New Jersey coast — ~$68.7 billion in damage, at least 233 deaths, a presidential-election backdrop, and the Occupy Sandy mutual-aid response. |
